Operation 'updateCommission' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Added clarity about partial update support, return value, and side effects related to financial stat recalculation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Updates the specified commission by setting the values of the parameters passed.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing commission with the provided parameters. Accepts partial updates - only specified fields will be modified. Returns the updated commission object. Note: Updating a commission may trigger recalculation of financial stats for the associated affiliate and campaign.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't specify what fields can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, or what side effects occur. Added clarity about partial update support, return value, and side effects related to financial stat recalculation for better AI agent decision-making.

Summary uses 'Generate' which is clearer than 'Retrieve' for this action. Description lacks clarity about the return format (SsoLinkResponse), the one-time nature of the link, and its expiration behavior. Enhanced version provides complete context about what is returned and the security implications, helping AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a secure, one-time URL for automated affiliate dashboard login.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate one-time SSO link for affiliate dashboard
data.description_suggestion: Generates a secure, one-time URL that enables automated login to the affiliate dashboard for the specified affiliate. The returned SsoLinkResponse contains the magic link URL. This link is single-use and expires after the first login attempt. Useful for programmatic affiliate onboarding and dashboard access without password management.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'Generate' which is clearer than 'Retrieve' for this action. Description lacks clarity about the return format (SsoLinkResponse), the one-time nature of the link, and its expiration behavior. Enhanced version provides complete context about what is returned and the security implications, helping AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.
